items.title_en: OpenAI in talks with EU over access to new cyber model but Anthropic still holding out on Mythos
items.title_zh: OpenAI 正在与欧盟就新网络模型的使用进行谈判，但 Anthropic 仍坚持神话
items.desc_en: OpenAI announced on Thursday it was granting preview access to its latest cyber model to vetted cybersecurity teams.
items.desc_zh: OpenAI 周四宣布，将向经过审查的网络安全团队授予其最新网络模型的预览访问权限。

items.title_en: Circle raises $222 million from BlackRock, Apollo and others in Arc token presale valued at $3 billion
items.title_zh: Circle 通过 Arc 代币预售从 BlackRock、Apollo 等公司筹集了 2.22 亿美元，价值 30 亿美元
items.desc_en: Andreessen Horowitz served as the lead investor in the sale with a $75 million investment. Other investors include BlackRock and Apollo Funds.
items.desc_zh: Andreessen Horowitz 担任此次出售的主要投资者，投资额为 7500 万美元。其他投资者包括贝莱德和阿波罗基金。

items.title_en: This streaming stock is set for even more gains ahead, according to Baird
items.title_zh: 贝尔德表示，这只流媒体股票未来将获得更多涨幅
items.desc_en: The investment firm upgraded the stock to outperform from neutral.
items.desc_zh: 该投资公司将该股评级从“中性”上调至“跑赢大盘”。

items.title_en: Portrait looted by Nazis found in home of Dutch SS leader's descendants
items.title_zh: 在荷兰党卫军领导人后裔家中发现纳粹掠夺的肖像
items.desc_en: The painting is believed to have been plundered by high-ranking Nazi Hermann Goering during World War Two.
items.desc_zh: 据信，这幅画是在第二次世界大战期间被纳粹高级领导人赫尔曼·戈林掠夺的。

items.title_en: UK PM Starmer battles for political survival in pivotal speech as gilt yields rise

items.desc_en: Starmer said that key issues of growth, defense, the U.K.'s relationship with Europe and energy must be urgently addressed.
items.desc_zh: 斯塔默表示，必须紧急解决增长、国防、英国与欧洲的关系以及能源等关键问题。

items.title_en: Nintendo plunges 8% after Switch 2 price hike and weak sales forecast
items.title_zh: Switch 2 涨价和销售预测疲软导致任天堂股价暴跌 8%
items.desc_en: Investors are concerned about Nintendo's outlook of lower Switch 2 sales in the current fiscal year, driven by price rises for the console.
items.desc_zh: 由于游戏机价格上涨，投资者对任天堂本财年 Switch 2 销量下降的前景感到担忧。

items.desc_en: A body found in New South Wales is thought to be that of a man wanted over a triple murder.

items.desc_zh: 他表示，紧缩措施将减少印度的燃料使用并有助于节省外汇。

items.desc_zh: 沙特阿美表示，其东西方管道有助于缓解伊朗战争造成的能源冲击。

items.desc_en: The retail trades added nearly 22,000 jobs  in April, accounting for about one-fifth of total job growth.
items.desc_zh: 4月份零售业增加了近22,000个就业岗位，约占总就业增长的五分之一。

items.title_en: Dying with a health savings account can leave a tax bomb for heirs
items.title_zh: 带着健康储蓄账户去世可能会给继承人留下税务炸弹
items.desc_en: Non-spouse beneficiaries like children and grandchildren can be on the hook for a big tax bill if they inherit a health savings account.
items.desc_zh: 如果孩子和孙子等非配偶受益人继承了健康储蓄账户，他们可能会承担巨额税款。

items.title_en: Why one of the nation's largest auto lenders isn't worried about high vehicle prices or 'forever loans'
items.title_zh: 为什么美国最大的汽车贷款机构之一不担心高车价或“永久贷款”
items.desc_en: While median car payments have jumped from $390 to $525 since 2019, data provided by Capital One suggests stability in vehicle cost compared to income.
items.desc_zh: 尽管自 2019 年以来，汽车支付中位数已从 390 美元跃升至 525 美元，但第一资本提供的数据表明，与收入相比，汽车成本保持稳定。

items.title_zh: 威士忌行业：经历了可怕的三年后，投资者将希望寄托在特朗普取消苏格兰威士忌关税上
items.desc_en: President Trump's decision to ditch the 10% tariff on Scotch whisky could boost the market for premium cask collecting.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普总统决定取消对苏格兰威士忌征收 10% 的关税，这可能会提振优质木桶收藏市场。

items.title_en: International cyber attack disrupts swathe of universities and schools
items.title_zh: 国际网络攻击扰乱了大片大学和学校
items.desc_en: A hacking group breached the academic software Canvas, used by thousands of schools and universities across the globe.
items.desc_zh: 一个黑客组织入侵了全球数千所学校和大学使用的学术软件 Canvas。

items.title_en: Australian by-election a litmus test for right-wing One Nation Party
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚补选是右翼一国党的试金石
items.desc_en: Victory for the populist party in Farrer, New South Wales, would see One Nation's first MP elected to Australia's national parliament.
items.desc_zh: 如果民粹主义政党在新南威尔士州法雷尔获胜，一国党将成为澳大利亚国民议会的第一位议员。

items.title_en: TikTok rows back AI video descriptions in US after absurd errors
items.title_zh: TikTok 在美国因出现荒谬错误而收回人工智能视频描述
items.desc_en: While only rolled out to some TikTok users, the feature's bizarre AI-generated descriptions were shared widely.
items.desc_zh: 虽然仅向部分 TikTok 用户推出，但该功能由人工智能生成的奇异描述却被广泛分享。

items.title_en: Instagram privacy tech is turned off today- what does this mean for your DMs?

items.desc_zh: 该平台表示将删除端到端加密消息，这是母公司 Meta 的一个重大转变。

items.desc_zh: 能够捕获热量的分子可能是一种有用的供暖脱碳技术。

items.desc_zh: Meta表示Ofcom的计算“不成比例”； the regulator said it would defend its position.

items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，随着对超快速交付的需求的增长，它希望慢慢扩大这项服务。

items.desc_en: After Ukraine's President Zelensky said territory had been captured using just robots and drones, what is the future of unmanned warfare?
items.desc_zh: 在乌克兰总统泽伦斯基表示仅使用机器人和无人机就占领了领土之后，无人战争的未来是什么？
